citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
At the time of the inspection, the facility representative was unable to locate the following required records: the semi-
annual findings from the September 24, 2025 inspection and review; the letter to the Institutional Official regarding this
semi-annual review; and its associated signatures by the IACUC. These documents were stored on the computer of the
facility representative who maintained the IACUC records, but is no longer employed at the facility. Despite the facility
representative reaching out to the IT department to retrieve the documents, they were unable to recover the information
stored on the previous employee’s computer.
Review of essential records at a facility ensure they are operating as intended, assessing the care and welfare of the
animals involved in regulated activities. The facility shall ensure that records required by the Animal Welfare Act (AWA)
and animal welfare regulations are available for APHIS officials to review on all inspections.
Correct by May 15, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.126(a)(2) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
At the time of the inspection, the facility representative was unable to locate the following required records: the semi-
annual findings from the September 24, 2025 inspection and review; the letter to the Institutional Official regarding this 
semi-annual review; and its associated signatures by the IACUC. These documents were stored on the computer of the 
facility representative who maintained the IACUC records, but is no longer employed at the facility. Despite the facility 
representative reaching out to the IT department to retrieve the documents, they were unable to recover the information 
stored on the previous employee’s computer.  
 
Review of essential records at a facility ensure they are operating as intended, assessing the care and welfare of the 
animals involved in regulated activities. The facility shall ensure that records required by the Animal Welfare Act (AWA) 
and animal welfare regulations are available for APHIS officials to review on all inspections. 
 
Correct by May 15, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
